/usr/bin/ar qc libspark.a CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/random/seed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/particle/pusher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/particle/boundary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/spatial/grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/interpolate/weight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/interpolate/field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/em/struct_poisson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/collisions/mcc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/collisions/scattering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/em/thomas_poisson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/em/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/em/electric_field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/particle/tiled_boundary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/em/cylindrical_poisson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/random/backends/xoshiro256plus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spark.dir/src/random/backends/ziggurat.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libspark.a
